item.title: Hindustan Aeronautics Ltd Surges 3.42% to Day's High of Rs 4770 — Outperforms Sector by 2.86 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex edged down by 0.02% on 07 May 2026, while Hindustan Aeronautics Ltd surged 3.42%, outperforming its Aerospace & Defense sector by 2.86 percentage points. This strong single-session gain stands out as a stock-specific event amid a broadly flat market, signalling renewed investor interest in the company’s shares. Time: 15 minutes ago

item.title: TCI Express Ltd Surges 8.03% to Day's High of Rs 585.95 — Outperforms Sector by 8.15 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex edged up a mere 0.06% on 07 May 2026, while TCI Express Ltd surged 8.03%, outperforming its Transport Services sector by 8.15 percentage points. This sharp single-session gain stands out as a distinctly stock-specific event amid a broadly flat market. Time: 15 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Belrise Industries Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 227
item.description: With a decisive surge to Rs 227 on 7 May 2026, Belrise Industries Ltd has reached a fresh 52-week and all-time high, propelled by a confluence of bullish technical indicators and sustained price momentum. Time: 25 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Rashi Peripherals Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 521
item.description: Surging past its previous peaks, Rashi Peripherals Ltd touched a new 52-week high of Rs 521 on 7 Jun 2026, marking a remarkable 91.08% gain over the past year. This milestone comes amid a backdrop of strong technical momentum and sustained earnings growth, positioning the stock well above its 52-week low of Rs 245.6. Time: 25 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Uniparts India Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 569
item.description: Surging past the Rs 569 mark on 7 May 2026, Uniparts India Ltd has reached a fresh 52-week high, propelled by a confluence of robust technical indicators and sustained price momentum that outpaces its sector and the broader market. Time: 26 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Harsha Engineers International Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 469
item.description: With a decisive surge to Rs 469 on 7 May 2026, Harsha Engineers International Ltd has reached a fresh 52-week high, marking a significant milestone in its price momentum. This rally comes amid a backdrop of strong technical signals and sustained outperformance relative to its sector and the broader market. Time: 26 minutes ago

item.title: Bharat Forge Ltd. Hits New 52-Week High of Rs 2025 on Back of Strong Technical Signals
item.description: From a 52-week low of Rs 1080.15 to a fresh peak of Rs 2025, Bharat Forge Ltd. has surged over 71% in the past year, outpacing the Sensex’s decline of 3.4%. This milestone reflects a powerful technical momentum that has propelled the stock to new heights amid a broadly positive market backdrop. Time: 26 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Epsom Properties Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 10.39
item.description: With a decisive surge to Rs 10.39 on 7 May 2026, Epsom Properties Ltd has reached a fresh 52-week high, marking a notable milestone in its price momentum. This advance comes amid a backdrop of strong technical signals and a market environment where the Sensex trades near its own recent peaks. Time: 26 minutes ago

item.title: Belrise Industries Ltd Hits All-Time High of Rs 226.20 as Momentum Builds Across Timeframes
item.description: Belrise Industries Ltd, a key player in the Auto Components & Equipments sector, achieved a significant milestone on 7 May 2026 as its stock price reached an all-time high of ₹226.20, marking a new peak in its trading history. This achievement reflects the company’s sustained performance and resilience amid a dynamic market environment. Time: 33 minutes ago

item.title: Strong Momentum Meets Stretched Valuations as Happy Forgings Ltd Reaches All-Time High
item.description: Happy Forgings Ltd, a key player in the Castings & Forgings sector, reached a significant milestone on 07 May 2026 by touching its all-time high price of Rs. 1,397.90. This achievement reflects the company’s robust performance and sustained upward momentum in the stock market. Time: 33 minutes ago

item.title: Seshaasai Technologies Ltd Surges 7.47% to Day's High of Rs 267.8 — Outperforms Sector by 8.14 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex edged up 0.15% on 07 May 2026, while Seshaasai Technologies Ltd surged 7.47%, outperforming its sector by 8.14 percentage points. This sharp single-session gain rewrites the short-term narrative for the small-cap software company, raising the question: is this a breakout or a recovery rally within a broader trend? Time: 45 minutes ago

item.title: Harsha Engineers International Ltd Surges 17.0% to Day's High of Rs 451.15 — Outperforms Sector by 11.54 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex edged up a modest 0.15% on 7 May 2026, but Harsha Engineers International Ltd surged 17.01%, reaching a new 52-week high of Rs 451.15. This 11.54 percentage-point outperformance over its sector highlights a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a broad market lift. Time: 45 minutes ago

item.title: Paras Defence and Space Technologies Ltd Surges 7.1% to Day's High of Rs 869.85 — Outperforms Sector by 6.86 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex edged up a modest 0.15% on 07 Jun 2026, but Paras Defence and Space Technologies Ltd surged 7.1%, marking a standout session in the Aerospace & Defense sector with an outperformance of nearly 7 percentage points. This sharp intraday gain rewrites the short-term narrative for the stock, raising the question of whether this is a breakout or a continuation of existing momentum. Time: 45 minutes ago

item.title: Bharat Forge Ltd. Surges 6.6% to Day's High of Rs 1928 — Outperforms Sector by 1.64 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex edged up by a modest 0.16% on 7 May 2026, while Bharat Forge Ltd. surged 6.6%, touching an intraday high of Rs 1928. This 1.64 percentage-point outperformance over its Auto Components & Equipments sector peers highlights a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a broad market lift. Time: 45 minutes ago

item.title: John Cockerill India Ltd Surges 7.35% to Day's High of Rs 5583 — Outperforms Sector by 5.04 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex edged up 0.15% while John Cockerill India Ltd surged 7.35% on 07 Jun 2026, reaching an intraday high of Rs 5583. This 5.04 percentage-point outperformance over its sector highlights a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a broad market lift. Time: 45 minutes ago

item.title: Rashi Peripherals Ltd Hits All-Time High of Rs 521 as Momentum Builds Across Timeframes
item.description: Rashi Peripherals Ltd has reached a new all-time high on 07 May 2026, closing at Rs 521.00, underscoring the company’s robust performance and sustained growth in the IT hardware sector. This milestone reflects a remarkable journey marked by strong financial metrics and consistent market outperformance. Time: 53 minutes ago

item.title: DEE Development Engineers Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit With 4.99% Gain — Buyers Queue, Sellers Absent
item.description: At Rs 457.7, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. DEE Development Engineers Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 4.99% on 7 May 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Nuvama Wealth Management Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Strong Market Momentum
item.description: Nuvama Wealth Management Ltd has witnessed a significant surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened investor interest and potential directional bets. The stock has outperformed its sector peers with a 2.77% gain today, supported by robust volume and rising investor participation, marking a notable shift in market positioning. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Micro-Cap We Win Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit — Rs 0.22 Crore Turnover and Rising Delivery Tell the Story
item.description: At Rs 60.58, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. We Win Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 20%% on 07 May 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Rama Steel Tubes Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit With 2.09% Gain — Buyers Queue, Sellers Absent
item.description: At Rs 6.03, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. Rama Steel Tubes Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 5% on 7 May 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 1 hour ago
